Author: Maateria
Name: XIVSchAssitant
Description: Automatic Scholar assistant: summons Eos on login, instance entry, and after wipes; repositions her to the arena center in 8-player raids; plays an alert when Biolysis falls off; and shows a countdown overlay when Chain Stratagem is coming off cooldown. Use /xivsch to open settings.
Punchline: Scholar assistant: auto Eos summon/placement, Biolysis DoT alert, Chain Stratagem countdown.
